commands_run: coord claim model-slice-chunk-range-floor "Next model-data wall after PR #3156: add bounded chunk-range slice policy receipt; avoid live mesh transport, durable eval query, optimizer deltas, privacy/conflict, router/audio, and BML compiler lanes."

failure_reason: Added a bounded model slice chunk-range policy receipt. The new floor accepts contiguous tensor chunk-index ranges under a chunk-set root and rejects gaps, wrong tensors, and file-cache authority while leaving live mesh transport, payload merkle proof, durable query, optimizer deltas, privacy, and conflict policy explicit as next walls.
